Class EnvironmentMonitorAutoConfiguration.BusPropertyPathConfiguration

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.config.monitor.EnvironmentMonitorAutoConfiguration.BusPropertyPathConfiguration
Enclosing class:
EnvironmentMonitorAutoConfiguration
@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods=false) @ConditionalOnClass(org.springframework.cloud.bus.BusProperties.class) protected static class EnvironmentMonitorAutoConfiguration.BusPropertyPathConfiguration extends Object
